programme.title: Stoked on Fishing - An Unforgettable Trip, South Lake, Part Two
programme.desc: This show was filmed in late October of 2019. Four months prior, in June of 2019, Tim Carnahan was diagnosed with Glioblastoma, Brain Cancer. According to Tim's medical team, his life expectancy could be between three months and 18 months. Fast forward to now, 2020; today's update is one we hoped would never come. With a heavy heart and tear-filled eyes, we share with you that Tim Carnahan has passed away after battling for close to 12 months. It only fits that the last words to pass his lips were I love you, Lory, and keep fishing. While his time on earth was cut short, the amount of joy he experienced and shared with others was genuinely tremendous and will never be forgotten. If you would like to help out in any way, lory and friends have put together a Go Fund Me page to ease the financial burden of medical bills and afford lory some time to greave and transition into life without Tim. We love you, Tim. Rest in peace, buddy.

programme.desc: Gray seals look like cute swimming puppy dogs, and their story of recovery from the brink of extinction is one of history's best examples of conservation. Then we travel to the town of Oslob in the Philippines, where the locals have switched from hunting Whale Sharks to teaching them to perform for tourists.

programme.desc: This remote Pacific island is a diver’s paradise and we take advantage of this by diving with giant Manta Rays the size of a small plane. The craziest dive though is when Bill feeds dozens of sharks with no protective gear. We also film where no one has filmed before…The Forbidden Island.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Mike Glover, Green Beret and retired CIA operative, joins Don to kick it up a notch for our contestants. What would Surviving Mann be without some log PT? If it’s good enough for the Seals - it’s good enough for our contestants. If that wasn’t hard enough, Don and Mike have the contestants do some tire pulling, a run, tug of war, land nav and a Tyrolean traverse over alligator infested water. Oh, and did we mention the 40mph wind and rain storm?

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The wrath of Mann is upon the contestants as Don doles out punishments to the entire squad for one person’s mistake. On the tails of the punishment, Don leads everyone in a lesson on BUD/S training. Later, co-host and retired Green Beret, Mike Glover, gives the contestants a life lesson on survival they won’t soon forget. To top off the episode, one of the contestants demonstrates his industry-changing hollow point bullets in some meaty targets.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: In this episode, competitor James gives us an update on how his injuries are progressing and how he’s able to push through when most thought he would be long gone. Luckily for the competitors, he had a special demonstration ready that involved hollow points and gel blocks. Later, Matthew recaps his experience with “The Glove”. To cap things off, Chris also sits down with BodyHz to talk about innovations in the non-chemical health industry.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The Glove Returns with a vengeance! This crop of contestants is the best of the best.. but how do they stack up against The Glove? Where about to find out. After The Glove waves goodbye, it’s hot-headed friend makes a debut courtesy of Exothermic Technologies. The contestants have a hard time keeping a smile off their faces as they shoot at targets and then blow them up.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: Competitors Stephen and Danny sit down to recap the best and worst moments so far in the season. Also, Chris and Cindy sit down with Compliant Technologies’ founder to get the backstory on how the innovative product that is sweeping the nation (and terrorizing the contestants) came to be. Then Dr. West drops some truth bombs on the state of the average human body’s blood.

programme.title: Point Reyes National Seashore & Oregon Coast Sea Stacks
programme.desc: Enjoy over 2 hours of beautiful vistas our newest Ambient Nature Film "Point Reyes Seashore & Oregon Coast Sea Stacks". Explore the dramatic beauty of Point Reyes National Seashore & the stunning sea stacks of the Oregon Coast. Experience the calming effect of the seashore paired with a beautiful soundtrack. Feel your worries melt away, your heart rate slow, and breath deepen with each relaxing scene.

programme.title: Nature's Abstracts
programme.desc: This 2 hour moving art film immerses you in the wondrous abstract patterns found in nature through the fine art photography of Elizabeth Carmel.

programme.title: Preview for Croatia's Plitvice Lakes - Europe's Natural Wonders Episode 2
programme.desc: 🌊 Europe’s Natural Wonders, Episode 2: Croatia’s Plitvice Lakes 🇭🇷 | Official Preview Trailer ✨ Step into a fairytale world of turquoise lakes, cascading waterfalls, and emerald forests in Croatia’s Plitvice Lakes National Park — one of Europe’s most extraordinary natural treasures. This short film is the official preview trailer for our full 2-hour cinematic nature experience, Europe’s Natural Wonders – Episode 2: Croatia’s Plitvice Lakes, now streaming in breathtaking 4K on NatureStream.tv. 🎬 Journey along elevated wooden boardwalks as crystal waters flow from one lake to another through lush karst landscapes. Captured in ultra-high resolution, this film immerses you in the sights and sounds of one of UNESCO’s most iconic World Heritage Sites.

programme.title: Journey Along the Oregon Coast
programme.desc: Journey to the rugged, mist-shrouded frontier of the Pacific Northwest. This cinematic voyage captures the relentless energy of the sea as it carves through towering sea stacks and hidden coves. From the wind-swept bluffs of the northern headlands to the ancient, salt-sprayed forests that meet the tide, experience the raw and primal beauty of the Oregon shore in stunning 4K. A serene and powerful sanctuary where the rhythm of the tides defines the landscape.

programme.title: Wildflowers of Texas Hill Country
programme.desc: Experience the legendary spring transformation of the American Southwest. This cinematic journey travels through the rolling hills and granite outcrops of Central Texas, where the landscape is painted in the vibrant blues of the iconic Bluebonnet and the fiery reds of the Indian Paintbrush. A peaceful, high-definition escape into the heart of the Lone Star State’s most colorful season.

programme.title: Earth's Natural Wonders by Drone, Episode 14

programme.title: Droning the World, Episode 21

programme.title: Droning the World, Episode 22

programme.title: Django Meets Santana
programme.desc: The small desert town of Black City is held in a reign of terror by a nasty gang of criminals lead by the ruthless Bud Willer. Earnest, but inexperienced Sheriff Jack Ronson arrives in town to establish law and order. Mysterious bounty hunter Django helps Ronson out.

programme.title: Raiders of Red Gap 1943
programme.desc: In Raiders of Red Gap, the Range Busters ride into action when a ruthless gang plots to seize control of a frontier town. Crash Corrigan, Dusty King, and Alibi Terhune team up to outwit the outlaws with fast guns, daring stunts, and plenty of grit. With danger around every corner—and a touch of Alibi’s trademark humor—this action-packed Western gallops straight into classic Range Busters territory.

programme.title: Any Gun Can Play
programme.desc: A gang robs a gold shipment from a train. A so called bounty hunter is sent to track down the robbers and decides to let them lead him to the gold

programme.title: The Outlaw 1943
programme.desc: Howard Hughes’ notorious Western, The Outlaw, ignites the screen with passion, rivalry, and danger. When outlaw Billy the Kid (Jack Buetel) rides into town, he finds himself entangled in a volatile triangle with legendary gunslinger Doc Holliday (Walter Huston) and ruthless lawman Pat Garrett (Thomas Mitchell). But it’s the fiery beauty Rio McDonald (Jane Russell, in her breakout role) who stirs the deadliest conflict of all. A tale of guns, desire, and betrayal, The Outlaw blazes with the daring spirit that made it one of Hollywood’s most talked-about films.

programme.title: Enemy Of The Law
programme.desc: Willis Newcomb and Bart Carroll head a gang engaged in smuggling wanted-American criminals back into the United States from Mexico. Operating from Sharperville, an oil town on the American side of the border, they transport their human cargo in oil drums loaded on trucks. Border Patrolman Tom Sharper intercepts one of the trucks but is overpowered and left for dead

programme.desc: New Orleans is heads above the rest when it comes to parades and the art scene. Three local artists will be put to the test to design a New Orleans cocktail-inspired headpiece. But will a design twist prove that these creations can hold water?

programme.title: Bringing Down The House: The Bombing of Harvey's Casino
programme.desc: In the summer of 1980, two men wheeled what looked like an IBM computer into a Lake Tahoe casino. The events that followed rocked the industry, baffled bomb technicians, and changed the lives of a criminal’s and a casino magnate’s family forever.

programme.title: Heroes On Call: The Forgotten Story of America's First Paramedics
programme.desc: In the 1960s, Americans were dying at shocking rates due to inadequate emergency care. Enter Freedom House Ambulance Service: the first paramedics unit in the U.S., run and staffed by Black men and women. This is the origin story of EMS.

programme.title: Absolutely Albuquerque: Foraging for Flavor
programme.desc: With award-winning Chef Marie Yniguez, Amanda forages for wild ingredients along the Rio Grande, makes paletas—Mexican popsicles— from scratch, and enters a high pressure cooking competition.

programme.title: Blind Kitchen: Re-creating Southern Comfort Classic vs. Elevated American Fusion
programme.desc: It’s a culinary battle of the senses between two iconic chefs in the City Beautiful. Watch as Chef Liz of Garp & Fuss in Winter Park takes on Chef Trina of Se7en Bites in The Milk District. It’s The Knife versus The Whisk!
